title: vaccinium henryi var. chingii
intro: Vaccinium henryi var. chingii, also known as the Ching's bilberry or Chinese bilberry, is a plant species in the heath family (Ericaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vaccinium henryi var. chingii include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Vaccinium henrii var. chingii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to make capsules, tablets, or other forms of dietary supplements.
